changeSet.author: Komov
changeSet.sql: create table users( id uuid primary key , first_name varchar(127) not null , second_name varchar(127) not null, mail varchar(127) not null unique , password varchar(127) not null , registration_date date, role varchar(127) )

create table admins( id uuid primary key , first_name varchar(127) not null , second_name varchar(127) not null, mail varchar(127) not null unique , password varchar(127) not null , registration_date date , role varchar(127) )

create table workers( id uuid primary key , first_name varchar(127) not null , second_name varchar(127) not null, mail varchar(127) not null unique , password varchar(127) not null , registration_date date, role varchar(127) )

create table orders( id uuid primary key , descriptions varchar(127) not null , priorities varchar(127) default 'MIDDLE', publication_date date, user_id uuid references users(id), worker_id uuid references workers(id) )
